transcript: Speaker A (AI): ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B (Human): I roti making. Speaker A (AI): hahaha... ರೊಟ್ಟಿ making ಅಲ್ಲ... "I am making rotis" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [hahaha... not roti making... you should say "I am making rotis".] Speaker B (Human): ನನಗೆ english ಕಲಿಸ್ತೀಯಾ? [Will you teach me English?] Speaker A (AI): ಖಂಡಿತಾ! ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಬೇಗ english ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Sure! If you practice with me for 15 minutes a day, you can learn English quickly.] Speaker B (Human): ಆದ್ರೆ ನನ್ನ ಬಳಿ ಫೀಸ್ ಕಟ್ಟೋಕೆ ದುಡ್ಡೇ ಇಲ್ಲ. [But I don't have money to pay the fees.] Speaker A (AI): ಚಿಂತೆ ಬೇಡ. ನೀವು ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಯಿಂದ start ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ english ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Don't worry. You can start with just 1 Rupee. That's why 1 crore people have learned English with me on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): super ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super, how to join?] Speaker A (AI): ಕೆಳಗಿರುವ install button ಒತ್ತಿ, MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, ನಿಮ್ಮ english practice ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, and start your English practice.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.

summary: An AI avatar corrects a woman's English grammar in a split-screen video. The AI promotes the MySivi app, highlighting that users can practice daily for 15 minutes starting at just 1 Rupee. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app.
